item.title: Clinically correct, still running late
item.description: Sometimes you know exactly what to do, but your brain still won't cooperate. A relatable look at how ADHD can affect executive function, making it difficult to turn knowledge into action.

media:content.media:title: Clinically correct, still running late
media:content.media:description: Sometimes you know exactly what to do, but your brain still won't cooperate. A relatable look at how ADHD can affect executive function, making it difficult to turn knowledge into action.

item.title: Tips for Struggling with Eating
item.description: Practical strategies for making eating feel more manageable, especially on days when low energy, overwhelm, or executive function challenges make regular meals harder to maintain.

media:content.media:title: Tips for Struggling with Eating
media:content.media:description: Practical strategies for making eating feel more manageable, especially on days when low energy, overwhelm, or executive function challenges make regular meals harder to maintain.

item.title: Why does my brain feel underwater?
item.description: A woman believed she had ADHD, but the cause was something else. Here is the difference.

media:content.media:title: Why does my brain feel underwater?
media:content.media:description: A woman believed she had ADHD, but the cause was something else. Here is the difference.

item.title: You’re Not Overreacting, You’re Under-Regulated
item.description: Sometimes intense emotional reactions are a sign of an overwhelmed nervous system rather than a lack of self-control. This explores how emotional regulation affects stress, behavior, and everyday interactions.

media:content.media:title: You’re Not Overreacting, You’re Under-Regulated
media:content.media:description: Sometimes intense emotional reactions are a sign of an overwhelmed nervous system rather than a lack of self-control. This explores how emotional regulation affects stress, behavior, and everyday interactions.

item.title: She Thought It Was ADHD, But It Wasn't
item.description: A woman believed she had ADHD, but the cause was something else. Sasha Hamdani, MD explains the difference.

media:content.media:title: She Thought It Was ADHD, But It Wasn't
media:content.media:description: A woman believed she had ADHD, but the cause was something else. Sasha Hamdani, MD explains the difference.

item.title: Why does this sound fix me?
item.description: If you know, you know — and if you don’t, you might still feel it.

media:content.media:title: Why does this sound fix me?
media:content.media:description: If you know, you know — and if you don’t, you might still feel it.

item.title: Why ADHD Brains Get Tired by Small Decisions
item.description: A brief look at why small choices can feel draining for people with ADHD.

media:content.media:title: Why ADHD Brains Get Tired by Small Decisions
media:content.media:description: A brief look at why small choices can feel draining for people with ADHD.

item.title: Can TikTok Make You Think You Have ADHD?
item.description: Social media can increase awareness of ADHD, but it can also lead to misunderstandings. This explores the difference between relatable online content, common ADHD traits, and the importance of a thorough professional evaluation.

media:content.media:title: Can TikTok Make You Think You Have ADHD?
media:content.media:description: Social media can increase awareness of ADHD, but it can also lead to misunderstandings. This explores the difference between relatable online content, common ADHD traits, and the importance of a thorough professional evaluation.

item.title: Simple task, full side quest
item.description: If one tiny thing turned into 12 tabs, you’re in the right place.

media:content.media:title: Simple task, full side quest
media:content.media:description: If one tiny thing turned into 12 tabs, you’re in the right place.

item.title: When one text feels like a big deal
item.description: A relatable look at how one message can feel bigger than it seems, with a light, thoughtful take on ADHD experiences.

media:content.media:title: When one text feels like a big deal
media:content.media:description: A relatable look at how one message can feel bigger than it seems, with a light, thoughtful take on ADHD experiences.

item.title: Hormones and ADHD: a familiar pattern
item.description: A look at how ADHD and perimenopause can overlap, and why the pattern may feel familiar once you see it this way.

media:content.media:title: Hormones and ADHD: a familiar pattern
media:content.media:description: A look at how ADHD and perimenopause can overlap, and why the pattern may feel familiar once you see it this way.

item.title: The ADHD Productivity Hack That Works
item.description: A simple productivity strategy designed to help reduce overwhelm, improve task initiation, and make it easier to stay focused when managing ADHD.

media:content.media:title: The ADHD Productivity Hack That Works
media:content.media:description: A simple productivity strategy designed to help reduce overwhelm, improve task initiation, and make it easier to stay focused when managing ADHD.

item.title: Why Many Women Missed ADHD Signs
item.description: A look at why ADHD in women has often gone unrecognized and how awareness is changing.

media:content.media:title: Why Many Women Missed ADHD Signs
media:content.media:description: A look at why ADHD in women has often gone unrecognized and how awareness is changing.

item.title: Need subtitles? A look at real-time processing
item.description: A brief look at how some brains translate speech in real time, which can feel awkward but is not rude.

media:content.media:title: Need subtitles? A look at real-time processing
media:content.media:description: A brief look at how some brains translate speech in real time, which can feel awkward but is not rude.
